short_text: Bilal Khan to Mustafizur, Caught by Zeeshan Maqsood!! Mishit-massive skier-taken! Slower ball, fuller and Mustafizur was
full_text: Bilal Khan to Mustafizur, Caught by Zeeshan Maqsood!! Mishit-massive skier-taken! Slower ball, fuller and Mustafizur was obviously going to throw the kitchen sink at it. Gets defeated by the slower one and slices this straight up towards the long-off region. Was in the night sky for ages. Maqsood calmly settles under it, although he didn't quite grab it that convincingly. Important thing was that it stuck. He was a wry smile. !

full_text: Bilal Khan to Mustafizur, no run, short ball, sharp stuff from Mustafizur who is late on it, misses the pull

full_text: Bilal Khan to Mahmudullah, Bowled!! ! Cleverly bowled off-cutter, on a length and Mahmudullah wanted to go big downtown. Get defeated by the grip off the deck and finds the off pole going for a walk. Superb bowling from Oman's seasoned death bowler.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, very full and outside off, drilled to extra cover where Zeeshan makes a half-stop. Prevented a certain boundary

full_text: Bilal Khan to Taskin Ahmed, leg byes, , bonus runs! Full and a bit too straight, Taskin missed the flick but got a healthy deflection off the pad, beating the diving Naseem Khushi to his right and it went to the fence in a flash. Bangladesh will take the runs anyway they come

short_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mahmudullah, , and that blip from Naseem Khushi becomes all the more glaring with this boundary! Mahmudul
full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mahmudullah, , and that blip from Naseem Khushi becomes all the more glaring with this boundary! Mahmudullah wouldn't have been on strike but for that fumble and he makes Oman pay. Width on offer from Butt, stock pace and it's sliced away between short third man and backward point. Much-needed for Bangladesh. Still was a decent over for Oman

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Taskin Ahmed, byes, 1 run, slower ball into the surface, Taskin is early into the pull and misses completely. Naseem Khushi fumbles to allow a bye and that brings Mahmudullah back on strike

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, very full and straight, clipped away through backward square leg. Good tag team effort in the deep to save a couple of runs

short_text: Fayyaz Butt to Saifuddin, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Another slower ball, on a good length and Saifuddin came charging d
full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Saifuddin, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Another slower ball, on a good length and Saifuddin came charging down to create some momentum of his own for the big shot. Still failed to get the desired connection on the flat-batted hit, picking out in joy. This is excellent at the death from Oman.

short_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mushfiqur, Caught by Naseem Khushi!! Edged and taken! Clever stuff from Butt, knows that Mushfiqur will f
full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mushfiqur, Caught by Naseem Khushi!! Edged and taken! Clever stuff from Butt, knows that Mushfiqur will feast on anything with pace on it, and hence bowls a slower ball on a hard length. Don't think Mushfiqur picked it and even if he did, was defeated by the extra bounce off the deck. Wanted to get this between the keeper and short third man, only manages an edge through behind to Naseem Khushi.

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Mushfiqur, , goes for the widish slower ball but it's a bit too wide outside off

full_text: Mohammad Nadeem to Mahmudullah, , Bad ball and Mahmudullah smokes this over deep backward square leg. full_text: Kaleemullah to Mushfiqur, , poor ball that ruins an otherwise fab over from Kaleemullah! Went for the slower ball again but fed width to Mushfiqur with nobody sweeping behind square on the off-side. He just had to pick his gap, and did so by gliding this between short third man and backward point

full_text: Kaleemullah to Mahmudullah, 1 run, fuller and straighter, nurdled past mid-wicket

short_text: Kaleemullah to Naim, Caught by Ayaan Khan!! this is such a massive wicket! Naim was set and looking to go up a gear in t
full_text: Kaleemullah to Naim, Caught by Ayaan Khan!! this is such a massive wicket! Naim was set and looking to go up a gear in these death overs but it isn't to be tonight! Excellent bowling from Kaleemullah, dug this into the surface with no pace on offer. Naim probably didn't pick the variation and eventually had to check his pull shot. Too late, as the top edge flies straight down to a forward-charging long-on fielder. Oman are derailing Bangladesh's late assault with a flurry of wickets.

full_text: Kaleemullah to Mahmudullah, 1 run, slower ball, on a good length and Mahmudullah heaves it away towards deep mid-wicket. Naim was keen on the second run but is wisely sent back by his skipper

full_text: Kaleemullah to Naim, 1 run, another mishit, just short of long-off! Naim wanted to go big down the ground, got it a bit off the cue-end. Got away with it in the end

full_text: Kaleemullah to Afif Hossain, Caught by Jatinder Singh!! Good catch!! Oman have been guilty of spilling a few dollies, so that makes this take all the more laudable. Especially as Jatinder himself did drop one earlier. Widish off-cutter, induces the mishit from Afif who was trying to go over extra cover. Ended up slicing it a bit towards the sweeper cover region. Jatinder circled around it and judged the skier perfectly.

full_text: Bilal Khan to Afif Hossain, 1 run, pitched up on middle and leg, dug out down to long-on

full_text: Bilal Khan to Afif Hossain, no run, waste of a review, more so when you consider that it wasn't even against Naim! Was an in-angler from Khan, brushed Afif's pads en route to the keeper down the leg-side. Oman felt that there was a tiny deflection of the bat and went for the review, only to be proven horribly wrong. Flat line on UltraEdge and that's a review burned

full_text: Bilal Khan to Naim, , What's with these modern day boys not wanting to use both hands? All is well that ends well though. This is a slot ball, in the arc for Naim who hammers this all the way. For a moment, long-on would have fancied his chances but it cleared him by some margin

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Nurul Hasan, Caught by Sandeep Goud!! Holes out to long-off! Nurul tries to go downtown but Maqsood cleverly pulled his length back a touch and gave it lots of air. Induced the mishit and Goud makes no mistake near the fence. Oman chipping away at the wickets.

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Naim, no run, flatter and fuller, Naim hammers it straight back down the track, Maqsood does well to get a hand on this and make the stop

full_text: Zeeshan Maqsood to Naim, , launched down the ground! Fired full, but it's in the slot and Naim hammers it back over the umpire's head. Races to the fence in a flash. It's been a fine knock from the southpaw so far, paced his knock well

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Nurul Hasan, 1 run, angling into the hips, Nurul tucks it away towards wide long-on. They run hard and snare a brace. Oh hang on, seems like Naim hasn't completed the first run properly, so it will be one short

full_text: Fayyaz Butt to Shakib, Shakib Run Out!! ! Oman desperately needed to break this partnership and a smart bit of fielding gives them just that. Was a wide yorker, dabbed into the off-side and they decided to take a sharp single. Was always going to be game over for Shakib in case of a direct hit and that's precisely what Ilyas provides. Terrific stuff and the hosts are chuffed to bits. Don't think Shakib expected the throw to hit the target but it did. A bullet throw that too and the all-rounder was also ball-watching.

full_text: Mustafizur to Aqib Ilyas, Lbw!! Mustafizur draws first blood! Much-needed for Bangladesh after the awry opening over from Taskin. Traditional left-arm seamer's wicket this, inswinger on a perfect middle-and-off line and Ilyas is clearly late to get his bat down in time. Gets rapped on the front pad and although there is an inside edge, that came after the impact on the front pad. Ilyas challenges the on-field call, only to be proven wrong by UltraEdge. Three Reds on HawkEye and he has to go.
